first_run.rationale: The evaluations are substantively identical despite the change in university. Both versions receive the same score (2/10) and focus on the same critical deficiencies: a lack of the required 5-10 years of C++ experience and the necessary domain expertise. The minor differences in wording for strengths and concerns are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's fitness for the role.
